basic_details.short_information: The Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) will recruit 24 ASI Para Medical Staff posts, which will be filled through CISF Recruitment 2026. Interested candidates can apply online from 08 June 2026 to 07 July 2026. Check details like eligibility, salary, apply online, vacancy, exam pattern & more from the article.

selection_process: Written Exam (OMR/CBT) – PST – Documentation – BVAT – Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Here, we have provided the direct, simple and easy steps to apply online for the CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026. Every candidate can follow these steps one by one and submit the application form.
seo_tags: CISF ASI Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification Out For 24 Posts, Apply Online Starts 08 June 2026
